name: Alabaster Jar of Anointing
oracleText:
When Alabaster Jar of Anointing enters the battlefield, you gain 2 life and scry 1.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice Alabaster Jar of Anointing: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains lifelink until end of turn.
flavorText: "She began to wash his feet with tears." — Luke 7:38
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Alexander Bida's "Jesus Anointing" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons marks the work and file as freely reusable.
classics.sourceNotes: Strong anointing scene with the right devotional and classical tone.
